biological_replicate: we pooled samples from 4 vGATCre:Psd-95-GFP mice to compare with 1 CaMKIICre:Psd-95-GFP mouse.
experimental_design: conditional knockout of Btbd11 from inhibitory interneurons disrupts the function of glutamatergic synapses.
number_of_fractions: We subsequently performed biochemical fractionation of wild-type (WT) mouse cortex.
